# moonbit-js-binding

> Write MoonBit bindings to JavaScript with `extern "js"`. Use for FFI declarations against browser/Node/Deno APIs or npm packages, wrapping JS objects in opaque types, bridging Promises (`async fn` / `Promise::wait()`), `moon.pkg` exports (esm/cjs/iife), and null/undefined at the JS boundary.

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/lang/moonbit-js-binding
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/lang/moonbit-js-binding
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients).

With the [`skills`](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) CLI (installs into
every detected agent's skills directory):

```bash
npx skills add mizchi/skills --skill moonbit-js-binding
```

Or copy the folder in directly:

```bash
npx degit mizchi/skills/lang/moonbit-js-binding ~/.claude/skills/moonbit-js-binding
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
